blocks.text: The following table shows the operating performance for 2019, versus 2018:

The following table shows certain consolidated statement of profit or loss data as a percentage of net
sales for our operations for 2018 and 2019:
Share in income of investments in associates 5.9% 0.3%
The sales cycle from quotation to shipment for our Front-end equipment generally takes several
months, depending on capacity utilization and the urgency of the order. Usually, acceptance
is within four months after shipment. The sales cycle is longer for equipment that is installed at the
customer’s site for evaluation prior to sale. The typical trial period ranges from six months to two years
Our revenues are concentrated in Asia, the United States and Europe. The following table shows the
geographic distribution of our revenue for 2018 and 2019:
